title: Generic 24 Disposable Clear Ice Cube Bags Ice Cube Maker Cola Cubes Juice Makes Over 600 Cubes, (SAP1027C)
features: Sealapack pack of 24 ice cube bags.

Sealapack Ice Cube Bags are the quick and easy way to make ice cubes from your home freezer. Each bag is designed with an easy to fill funnel at the top. Simply fill the bag with water and make a knot at the top of the bag to prevent any spillages. To freeze, simply place the bag in the freezer for approximately 6 hours.

Each ice cube bag makes 28 ice cubes, which can be popped out individually when needed. They are suitable for all cold liquids, not just water, so why not add some fruit juice, squash or even some cola for some tasty summer ice cubes.

The bags will lay flat in your freezer, making them more compact and convenient to store. The pack contains 24 clear bags, which in total makes over 600 cubes!! Perfect for family households, parties and bbqs.
